description: Hook bundle. auto-refine.sh on UserPromptSubmit — injects a system reminder telling Claude to evaluate every prompt against the refine-prompt skill's messiness heuristic, run the skill on messy prompts, skip on clean/short/mid-flow prompts, and treat the refined prompt as canonical after `go`. progress_publish.py on PostToolUse — publishes a coarse, sanitized live-progress label for the annotate web companion, outside the model loop (zero tokens).
